creator: stievenard.david@gmail.com
text:
the samba mailing list helped me to find the solution

since 4.3 dns secure updates with dns_internal are broken

https://bugzilla.samba.org/show_bug.cgi?id=11520
https://wiki.samba.org/index.php/Samba_Internal_DNS

so basically it's documented nowhere and the default installation doesn't work...
(no comment)
